---
name: obligatory_ai_generated_comment
description: >
  Ensures every new file and every new class created in this repository carries the mandatory
  AI-authorship marker comment "generated by AI in Github cloud". Use this skill whenever
  a new Java (or any) source file is created, a new class or nested class is defined,
  or any code generation task produces new files. Always apply this rule proactively —
  if in doubt whether a file is "new", add the comment.
---

# Skill: obligatory_ai_generated_comment

## Purpose

Every **new file** and every **new class** introduced into this repository must carry a
clearly visible AI-authorship marker so that every engineer (and any automated tool) can
immediately understand the origin of the code.

## Mandatory Comment Text

Add the following text **exactly as written** — no variation in capitalisation, punctuation,
or spacing is allowed:

```
generated by AI in Github cloud
```

In Java (and similar C-style languages), prefix it with a single-line comment marker:

```java
// generated by AI in Github cloud
```

## Placement Rules

| Situation | Where to place the comment |
|-----------|---------------------------|
| **New source file created** | First non-blank line of the file (before `package`, imports, or any other content) |
| **New top-level class defined** | Directly above the class declaration |
| **New inner / nested class defined** | Directly above the nested class declaration |

### Java — Correct Example

```java
// generated by AI in Github cloud
import java.time.LocalDate;

// generated by AI in Github cloud
public class HelloWorld {

    // generated by AI in Github cloud
    record Greeting(String recipient, String message) { ... }

    // generated by AI in Github cloud
    sealed interface TimeOfDay permits TimeOfDay.Morning, TimeOfDay.Afternoon, TimeOfDay.Evening {
        // generated by AI in Github cloud
        record Morning() implements TimeOfDay {}
        // generated by AI in Github cloud
        record Afternoon() implements TimeOfDay {}
        // generated by AI in Github cloud
        record Evening() implements TimeOfDay {}
    }
}
```

### Java — Test File Example

```java
// generated by AI in Github cloud
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

// generated by AI in Github cloud
class HelloWorldTest {
    // tests...
}
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Every **new** source file starts with `// generated by AI in Github cloud` on the very first line.
- [ ] Every **new class** (top-level, nested, inner, record, sealed permits) has the comment directly above its declaration.
- [ ] Comment text is **character-for-character identical** — case-sensitive, no trailing spaces, no extra punctuation.
- [ ] Present even in auto-generated files.
- [ ] Existing files that are only **modified** do NOT need the comment retroactively.

## Source

Cookbook: `cookbooks/ai-generated-comment-guideline.md`
